name: Load test scenario design for e-commerce checkout
description: Evaluate the skill's ability to design a comprehensive load test scenario for an e-commerce checkout flow, including workload modeling, ramp-up strategy, SLOs, and resource monitoring.
prompt: Our e-commerce site expects a flash sale that will drive 10x normal traffic. Design a load test scenario for the checkout flow (browse -> add to cart -> checkout -> payment). Include the workload model, ramp-up pattern, SLO definitions, resource monitoring plan, and the exact k6 or equivalent test structure. Normal traffic is 50 concurrent users with 200ms average response time.

assertions.description: Should define a ramp-up pattern that gradually increases load to 10x (500 concurrent users)
Should define specific SLOs with quantitative thresholds for latency and error rate
Should measure latency at meaningful percentiles (p50, p90, p95, p99), not just averages
Should include resource monitoring for CPU, memory, or other infrastructure metrics
Should model realistic user scenarios with think times and step sequences

name: Performance regression detection in CI
description: Evaluate the skill's ability to design a CI-integrated performance regression detection system that catches degradations before they reach production.
prompt: Our API's p95 latency has been creeping up over the last month but nobody noticed until users complained. Design a performance regression detection system integrated into our GitHub Actions CI pipeline. It should run benchmarks on every PR, compare against baselines, and fail the build if performance degrades beyond a threshold. Include the baseline management strategy and alerting approach.

assertions.description: Should describe a baseline management strategy for storing and comparing benchmark results
Should define regression thresholds that trigger build failures (e.g., 10% degradation)
Should integrate directly into CI pipeline to run automatically on PRs
Should compare current results against stored baselines using statistical or threshold methods
Should include alerting or notification when regression is detected
